title: New #1 open-source AI model is here!
summary: GLM 5.2 is reviewed as a leading open-source AI model with capabilities spanning digital earth visualization, 3D model generation, animation with voiceover, ray tracing, music composition, and deep research. It is positioned as integrable with Claude and available through Z.ai services.
writeup: The video reviews GLM 5.2, an open-source AI model positioned as a leading option, and walks through its multimodal range: digital earth visualization, animation with voiceover, 3D model generation, ray tracing, music composition, and mathematics animation. It also covers integration options, including use as a Claude code plugin. The takeaway is a single open-source model spanning visual, audio, and code-related tasks, with a path to plug into existing tooling.
